exercises.stem: Which of the following verbs is usually followed by an infinitive?
exercises.analysis: want 后面接不定式作宾语（want to do）。enjoy、finish、mind 后面通常接动名词 doing。

exercises.stem: I went to the library ___ some books.
exercises.analysis: 此处表示「为了借一些书」，不定式 to borrow 作目的状语。
encourage sb. to do sth. 是固定搭配，不定式 to study 作宾补。

exercises.stem: The infinitive form of the verb in a sentence always functions as the predicate.
exercises.analysis: 动词不定式在句中不能单独作谓语，它可以作宾语、宾补、目的状语、主语等。

segments: She decided ___1___ (not go) to the party.
exercises.analysis: decide not to do sth. 表示「决定不做某事」；to pass 作目的状语，表示「为了通过考试」。

exercises.question: 用不定式改写下列句子，使其表示目的：She saved money. (为了买一台电脑)
exercises.referenceAnswer: She saved money to buy a computer. / She saved money in order to buy a computer.
scoringPoints: 正确使用不定式 to buy a computer
